hero.title: Let's talk about your digital employee.
hero.description: Tell us briefly what you're working on. We'll get back to you within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What are you working on? What do you want to achieve?
form.success: Your message has arrived. We'll get back to you within one business day.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

booking.title: Book a call
booking.description: Pick a time that suits you — 30 minutes, no obligation, by phone or video call.
booking.unavailable: Booking is temporarily unavailable. Please use the form or give us a call — we'll find a time quickly.
booking.empty: There are no free slots in the next two weeks. Send us a message through the form and we'll find a time together.
booking.tzNote: All times in German time (Europe/Berlin). Duration: 30 minutes.
booking.name: Name
booking.success: A calendar invitation is on its way to your inbox. If something comes up, just decline through the invitation.
booking.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
booking.errorTaken: That slot was just taken. Reloading the available times …
booking.errorGeneric: The booking didn't go through. Please try again or send us a message through the form.
